---
title: "R training"
author: "Lindsey"
date: 2026-03-18
format: html
editor: visual
---

I am learning R!

```{r}
#Notes for coders


```

```{r}
3
4
typeof(8.5)
```

```{r}
"text strings are fun!"
typeof("strings")
```

```{r}
FALSE
TRUE
typeof(TRUE)
```

```{r}
a <- c(1, 2, 3)
a

c("a", "b", "c")
c(TRUE, FALSE)

c(1, "two", 3) 

```

### Lists (can hold mixed types)

```{r}
my_list <- list(numbers = c(1,2,3), words = c("a","b"), mixed = list(TRUE, 5))
str(my_list)
```

```{r}
df <- data.frame(id = 1:3,
                 mode = c("walk","car","bus"),
                 distance = c(1.2, 5.0, 3.4))
df

```
